svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux aarch64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="ep2RoMj4R-tv-wAKe0_s" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-424" dy="-155" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="Context Engineering: Four Core Strategies" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="640" x="80" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="llm" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="<b>LLM</b><br/>Context Window" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="320" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="write_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="<b>1. WRITE</b><br/>Save information outside<br/>the context for future use<br/><br/>• Scratchpads<br/>• Long-term memory stores<br/>• External files & notes<br/>• State objects" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="200" x="60" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="select_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="<b>2. SELECT</b><br/>Retrieve only relevant<br/>information when needed<br/><br/>• RAG / vector search<br/>• Knowledge graphs<br/>• Dynamic tool selection<br/>• Episodic memory retrieval" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="200" x="540" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="compress_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="<b>3. COMPRESS</b><br/>Reduce tokens while<br/>preserving key information<br/><br/>• Summarization<br/>• Trimming heuristics<br/>• Recursive compaction<br/>• Distillation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="200" x="60" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="isolate_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="<b>4. ISOLATE</b><br/>Split context across<br/>separate components<br/><br/>• Multi-agent systems<br/>• Sandboxed execution<br/>• Selective state exposure<br/>• Context partitioning" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="200" x="540" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="write_box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.3;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;" target="llm" value="stores & retrieves"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="select_box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.3;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;" target="llm" value="injects context"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="compress_box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.7;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;" target="llm" value="reduces window"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="isolate_box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.7;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontSize=10;" target="llm" value="partitions work"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="goal" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=11;arcSize=10;" value="<b>Goal:</b> Smallest set of high-signal tokens<br/>that maximize desired outcome" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="270" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
1. WRITE
Save information outside
the context for future use
• Scratchpads
• Long-term memory stores
• External files & notes
• State objects

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 188px; height: 1px; padding-top: 150px; margin-left: 507px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;

div.div:
2. SELECT
Retrieve only relevant
information when needed
• RAG / vector search
• Knowledge graphs
• Dynamic tool selection
• Episodic memory retrieval

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.div:
3. COMPRESS
Reduce tokens while
preserving key information
• Summarization
• Trimming heuristics
• Recursive compaction
• Distillation

div.div:
4. ISOLATE
Split context across
separate components
• Multi-agent systems
• Sandboxed execution
• Selective state exposure
• Context partitioning
